purpose: Ledger marking combat feats implemented during the combat-feat implementation passes. This is a tracking/audit file; it does not alter compendium rules text.
implementationBoundary: Implemented means the repo now has normalization metadata, runtime helpers, action adapters, advisory metadata, or canonical resolver hooks for the feat. Some feats intentionally remain workflow/advisory consumers where the required canvas, target, skill, movement, or damage application context is not yet fully automated.

Utility/non-combat helper experiments that were removed are intentionally not marked implemented.
